name: create_subscription
description: Create a recurring direct debit subscription in GoCardless that automatically creates payments at defined intervals. The subscription is linked to an active mandate and will keep creating payments until it reaches the end date or count. GoCardless handles the scheduling and retry logic.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: The amount to collect each interval in the smallest currency unit.

parameters.name: interval_unit
parameters.description: The unit of time between charges: 'weekly', 'monthly', or 'yearly'.

parameters.name: links[mandate]
parameters.description: The mandate ID to collect payments against (starts with 'MD').

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: The name of the subscription, displayed on invoices and the customer's bank statement.

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description: Number of interval_units between charges. Default 1. E.g., interval=2 with interval_unit='monthly' charges every 2 months.

parameters.name: day_of_month
parameters.description: Day of the month to charge (1-28, or -1 for the last day). Only applicable for monthly subscriptions.

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Total number of payments to collect. Leave empty for unlimited.

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: The date of the first payment in YYYY-MM-DD format.

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: The date after which no more payments should be created (YYYY-MM-DD).

parameters.name: metadata
parameters.description: Key-value pairs to store custom data. Max 3 keys.
